resources.string: "The old account type is no longer valid! Please upgrade immediately."
"The old account type is no longer valid!."
"Please upgrade your account on the Dashboard or Miner Client."
Are you sure you want to exit the app?
Only BKC and wBKC swaps are supported
Tokens require the new account key format.
wBKC contract is not deployed. Run the contracts deploy script first.
Transaction sent but confirmation timed out. Check the block explorer later.
Transaction submitted and confirming on-chain. Check history shortly.
Send %1$s to this address. Do not use the contract address for receiving; use your wallet address below.
Wrap or unwrap BKC via this contract. Do not use the contract address for receiving.
Failed to load balance. Check your network and try again.
Refreshing token balance in the background
Review the details below before submitting this on-chain transaction.
This action cannot be canceled after it is sent to the network.
Place the QR code inside the frame
Invalid address. Scan a valid wallet address.

wBKC is the wrapped version of BrokerChain\'s native token, BKC. It is pegged 1:1 to BKC. Deposit BKC to receive wBKC, and unwrap wBKC to get the same amount of BKC back. Do not send funds to the contract address. Use your wallet address to receive wBKC.
No tokens match your search or filters
Choose the token you want to use for this action.
This page shows the contract address for %1$s. Do not send funds to the contract address. Use your wallet address to receive tokens.
This token is already in the list
Not a valid ERC-20 token: cannot read symbol or decimals on-chain

Enter the contract address of an ERC-20 token deployed on BrokerChain to import it into your wallet. After importing, you can view its balance and history on the Tokens page. Please verify the token source and risks yourself. The wallet does not endorse third-party tokens.

• The address must start with 0x and be followed by 40 hexadecimal characters (0–9, a–f, case insensitive)
• Example: 0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678
• Do not include spaces, line breaks, or other extra characters
• The address must belong to a token contract on BrokerChain, not a personal wallet address
• When pasting or scanning, make sure the content is the contract address only. Prefixes such as ethereum: are handled automatically

• The contract should implement standard ERC-20 methods, including symbol(), name(), decimals(), balanceOf(), and transfer()
• On-chain name and symbol values may be stored as either string or bytes32
• wrapped BKC (wBKC) is built in by default, so its contract address should not be imported again
• A token that is already in your list cannot be added twice

• Anyone can deploy a token contract. Importing a token only adds it to your local wallet view and is not an official endorsement
• Common import failures include: invalid address, target is not a contract, token metadata cannot be read on-chain, or network issues
• Do not use the contract address to receive tokens. Always use your wallet address
• Only enable tokens you trust. You can disable unwanted tokens later in Manage tokens
Check: 1) Device can reach dash.broker-chain.com 2) Correct private key imported 3) Enough BKC for gas
Check: BrokerChain node is running and the account is unlocked
Check that the network can reach dash.broker-chain.com
Fill the private key in the dialog box below to import an existing account.
Can not import invalid private key
Only add custom networks you trust
Protect your key at all times.
Possession of your private keys allows unauthorized access and potential theft of your assets.
This operation will invoke the requestBroker() function in the smart contract.
Buying crypto is now easy and secure
We link you up with top-rate quotes from dependable sources and assist you throughout, simplifying the self-custody process.
Explore over 75 tokens across more than 8 blockchain networks
Quickly boost your wallet\'s balance using safe payment methods
Cut down on gas fees and save precious time

This password will only be saved locally.

The private key will be saved to:\n /Download/BrokerWallet/ \n private_keys_timestamp.txt
Claim BKC academic tokens through faucets
Claim some BKC for free every day
Click the Generate button to generate a new account\nThe private key will be shown in the dialog box below.
Click on the top right corner -> Settings -> Account -> Add account.
By using BrokerChain Wallet, you agree to the following statement:\nDisclaimer

BrokerChain (academic) is intended only for academic exchange. Users must not use BrokerChain (academic) for any illegal activity. Any direct or indirect consequences arising from use of BrokerChain are unrelated to the BrokerChain founding team. The BrokerChain (academic) founding team reserves the right to modify, update, or terminate BrokerChain (academic) at any time without prior notice. Users use BrokerChain (academic) at their own risk and agree to waive any claims against the founding team. This disclaimer is governed by and interpreted under the laws of the PRC.
Upload an image to create your unique NFT.
Create shared NFT:\nEnter shares (1=sole owner, >1 splits to X shares)

*This platform implements 'fractional NFT ownership':
- Divide NFTs into multiple shares
- Enable multi-user co-ownership
- Allow per-batch pricing
Submit materials to earn medals & NFT rewards~
Your owned NFTs are listed here.
Describe your work, e.g.: Developed multiple DeFi protocols, focused on smart contract security
💡 Tip: Representative work requires admin approval before displaying on ranking
Enter your display name for the leaderboard
Note: It will appear on the leaderboard after administrator approval.
Enter author name or author list
Describe the related BlockEmulator event in detail

To select files from apps like WeChat, follow these steps:
1️⃣ Find the file you want to upload in WeChat
4️⃣ Save the file to phone storage
5️⃣ Return to this page, click 「Select Proof File」 to find the saved file
💡 Tip: Most app files can be selected by 「Share → Save Locally」.
Image is optional. If you don\'t upload, you may receive a unique NFT crafted by the DAO!
💎 Upload Image: Use your photo as NFT
🎨 No Upload: Get a DAO-designed exclusive NFT
Both options are great, choose your preferred way!
Please choose where to select your NFT photo:
